meaning: n.<俚>流行音乐电视录像节目播放员
examples: How good are you compared to Veejay Singh?
If golf is your sport and you can beat your buddies in a round, how good are you compared to Tiger Woods, Ernie Els, or Veejay Singh?
But unlike many of his friends, he has no illusions about making it as a veejay, a video disk jockey.
